title: LogPanel — Full Data Enrichment + 3-Mode Filter
description: Enrich LogPanel.tsx with all available data sources: agent activity events, multi-directive events, subagent lifecycle, task progress, team events, connection status, enriched session metadata, and 3-mode filter.

in: Agent activity events from sessionActivities via useRef snapshot diffing with dedup/throttle
Subagent spawn/complete/error events from session.subagentIds and activeSubagentNames
Connection status events from connected state
Enriched session events with model, gitBranch, latestPrompt, feature context
Upgrade FilterToggle from 2-mode to 3-mode (Important / Activity / All)
out: No workState backlog/feature items as standalone events

dod.criterion: LogPanel surfaces agent activity events from sessionActivities with dedup/throttle
LogPanel shows events from all active directives and directive history
Subagent lifecycle events (spawn/complete/error) appear in the feed
Task progress events appear in the feed
Team lifecycle events appear in the feed
Connection lost/restored events appear in the feed
Session events show model, gitBranch, latestPrompt context
3-mode filter (Important/Activity/All) works correctly
TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.title: Extend FeedEvent source union + upgrade FilterToggle to 3-mode
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees a 3-way filter toggle (Important / Activity / All) and the log feed supports categorizing events from all new source types.
tasks.scope: Extend FeedEvent.source from 4 values to 9: add 'activity' | 'subagent' | 'task' | 'team' | 'connection'. Change FilterMode from 2-mode to 3-mode. Update FilterToggle to render 3 buttons. Update filter logic.

dod.criterion: FeedEvent.source type union includes all 9 sources
FilterToggle renders 3 buttons: Important, Activity, All
Filter logic correctly separates the 3 modes
No TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Agent activity events via useRef snapshot diffing
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees real-time agent activity in the log — tool calls, thinking states — as they happen, without duplicates or flooding.
tasks.scope: Add useRef for previous snapshot. Diff current vs previous on each render. Accumulate into FeedEvent[] buffer with dedup and throttle (max 1 event per session per 3s). Build buildActivityEvents function. Wire into allEvents useMemo.

dod.criterion: buildActivityEvents produces FeedEvent[] from sessionActivities diff
Dedup: same sessionId+tool+detail does not create duplicates
Throttle: max one event per session per 3 seconds
Events sorted correctly by timestamp with other event types
No TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Multi-directive events + connection status events
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees all active directives and their history in the log, plus connection lost/restored events.
tasks.scope: Refactor buildDirectiveEvents to accept activeDirectives[] and directiveHistory[]. Dedup by directiveName+status. Add weight/category badges. Add connection tracking via useRef. Wire both into allEvents.

dod.criterion: Directive events from activeDirectives[] and directiveHistory[]
Directive events include weight and category badges
Connection lost/restored events with source 'connection'
No duplicate directive events across sources
No TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Subagent lifecycle + team lifecycle events
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees when subagents spawn, complete, or error out, and when teams form or dissolve.
tasks.scope: Add diffSubagentEvents with useRef tracking. Add buildTeamEvents for team creation/stale events. Wire into allEvents.

dod.criterion: Subagent spawn/complete/error events with correct priorities
Subagent events include parent and child agent names
Team creation and member join events appear
Stale teams generate warning events
No TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Task progress events + enriched session event details
tasks.user_scenario: CEO sees task completion progress and session events with model, git branch, and feature context.
tasks.scope: Add task status diffing via useRef. Enrich buildSessionEvents with model, gitBranch, feature, truncated latestPrompt. Wire into allEvents.

dod.criterion: Task status transitions generate events with source 'task'
Task events include subject and owner
Session events include model and gitBranch in detail
Working sessions show truncated latestPrompt
No TypeScript errors

review.notes: Seeding race condition fixed (useEffect deps changed from [] to [sessions]/[tasksBySession]). Stale team timestamp fixed. Unused import removed.
